explanation: The user wants to clean the mug, which is currently dirty and on top of sinkbasin_1. Since the mug is already on the sinkbasin, I first need to go to it. Then, I pick it up to ensure I can perform the cleaning action. The cleaning action is modeled as pouring the contents of the mug into the sinkbasin, which effectively cleans it. This sequence ensures the mug is properly handled and cleaned in the correct order.
